TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_linugus, title = linugus, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/linugus} }

S.FORM: aicu a linugus, mavan a cevi' na 'ilisi tua kakudakudan na sevuculj. aicu a linugus, mavan hualap a vu na 'acang, ha, paca'is ta pi'ay.
S.PHON: aiʦu a ɭinugus, mavan a ʦəviʔ na ʔiɭisi tua kakudakudan na səvuʦuʎ. aiʦu a ɭinugus, mavan huaɭap a vu na ʔaʦaŋ, ha, paʦaʔis ta piʔaj.
S.FORM: aicu a linugus, mavan a cevi' na 'ilisi tua kakudakudan na sevuculj. aicu a linugus, mavan hualap a vu na 'acang, ha, paca'is ta pi'ay.
S.PHON: aiʦu a ɭinugus, mavan a ʦəviʔ na ʔiɭisi tua kakudakudan na səvuʦuʎ. aiʦu a ɭinugus, mavan huaɭap a vu na ʔaʦaŋ, ha, paʦaʔis ta piʔaj.
